sql.where:
G.PRJ_ID = #{prjId}
AND G.NAME LIKE '%' || #{grpName} || '%'
AND TRUNC(G.CREATED_ON) >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(G.CREATED_ON) <= TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

mapper.select:
SELECT G.ID AS id, G.NAME AS grpName, COUNT(M.USER_ID) AS cntMem, G.CREATED_ON AS createdOn FROM GRP G LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.GRP_ID = G.ID
GROUP BY G.ID, G.NAME, G.CREATED_ON ORDER BY G.ID
